description: Maps source fields containing monetary values to the Amount concept (MonetaryAmount). Each rule specifies how a source-specific numeric field should be interpreted in the shared ontology, including currency, frequency and value context.

rules.rationale: The reasoner identified gross_sek as a monetary field because the column name suggests an amount, samples are numeric, and SEK is inferred from the column name. Although frequency was unclear to the reasoner, the FK payment file represents monthly payment rows, so the mapper enriches this as Month.
The reasoner identified net_sek as a monetary field and inferred amount type Net. The mapper records it as the monthly amount received after tax withholding.

The reasoner identified tax_withheld_sek as monetary due to numeric values and SEK in the field name, but amount type was unclear. The mapper gives it a semantic context as the monthly tax withheld from the gross payment.
The reasoner identified gross_amount_sek as monetary and inferred Gross. The mapper interprets it as a gross total for the decision period in the current synthetic data.
The reasoner identified coordinated_gross_amount_sek as monetary and inferred Gross. The mapper records it as the coordinated gross total for the decision period.
The reasoner identified amount_per_week_sek as monetary and inferred frequency Week. The mapper stores it as a weekly CSN approved amount.
The reasoner identified total_amount_sek as monetary and inferred frequency Total. The mapper stores it as the total CSN amount for the approved period.
